# DeenPal

> DeenPal is a free AI-powered Islamic companion app for iPhone, designed to help Muslims deepen their faith and practice through intelligent, personalised tools.

## What is DeenPal?

DeenPal is an iOS app that combines GPS-accurate prayer times, daily Quran verses with AI explanation, an AI Islamic Q&A assistant, daily Islamic quizzes, and curated Muslim news — all in one app. It is free to download on the App Store.

- **App Store**: https://apps.apple.com/app/deenpal/id6742822690
- **Website**: https://getdeenpal.com
- **Support**: support@getdeenpal.com
- **Rating**: 4.9/5
- **Platform**: iOS 16.0+
- **Languages**: English, Dutch, Arabic
- **Price**: Free

## Core Features

### Prayer Times
GPS-accurate Salah times for Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, and Isha. Customisable notification reminders. Supports multiple calculation methods (ISNA, MWL, Egyptian, Umm al-Qura, etc.).

### Rafiq AI — Islamic Companion
A conversational AI assistant trained on Islamic knowledge. Answers questions about Quran, Sunnah, fiqh, and daily Muslim life. Provides evidence-based answers from authenticated sources. Supports cross-madhab comparisons (Hanafi, Maliki, Shafi'i, Hanbali).

### Hakim AI — Scholarly Mode
A more detailed, scholarly AI mode for deeper Islamic questions. Provides structured fiqh analysis with references to classical scholars and primary sources.

### Daily Quran
A daily Quran verse selected each morning with an AI-generated explanation of its meaning, context, and practical application for modern life.

### Islamic Quiz
Daily quiz questions covering Islamic history, fiqh, Quran, and general knowledge. Streak tracking to build consistent learning habits.

### Discover Feed
Curated Islamic news and articles from trusted sources worldwide.

### Qibla Direction
Compass-based Qibla direction using GPS location.

## Who Is DeenPal For?

DeenPal is built for Muslims of all backgrounds and knowledge levels — from new Muslims learning the basics to practising Muslims who want quick, reliable answers to fiqh questions. It is especially useful for:

- Muslims who want accurate prayer time notifications
- Anyone with questions about Islamic rulings (wudu, salah, zakat, fasting, etc.)
- Muslims who want to build a daily Quran and dhikr habit
- Students of Islamic knowledge who want quick reference answers

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What AI model does DeenPal use?**
DeenPal uses a custom AI system trained specifically on Islamic knowledge — Quran, Sunnah, and classical fiqh literature.

**Is DeenPal free?**
Yes. DeenPal is completely free to download and use on iPhone.

**Which madhab does DeenPal follow?**
DeenPal's AI (Rafiq and Hakim) presents rulings from all four major Sunni madhabs — Hanafi, Maliki, Shafi'i, and Hanbali — so users can follow their own tradition.

**Is DeenPal available on Android?**
Currently iOS only. Android version is in development.

**How accurate are the prayer times?**
Prayer times are calculated using the device's GPS location and the user's preferred calculation method. They are updated daily.

## Blog

DeenPal publishes free Islamic guides at https://getdeenpal.com/blog/ covering:
- Prayer (wudu, salah, tahajjud, fajr tips)
- Fiqh (zakat, madhabs, wudu nullifiers)
- Quran and dhikr
- Ramadan and Islamic seasons
- AI and Islamic education

## Contact

- General: support@getdeenpal.com
- Website: https://getdeenpal.com
